metadata.name: Commander Tax with Partner Commanders tracked independently (CC #27)
metadata.description: Corner case #27: Two partner commanders. Each is cast multiple times from the command zone. Commander tax is tracked per-commander: casting Commander A twice adds {4} to A's cost but does NOT affect Commander B's cost. CR 903.8: commander tax is per-card, not per-player. CR 702.124d: partner commanders function independently for tax tracking. This script exercises the full tax sequence: A cast first time (printed cost), A cast second time (+{2}), B cast first time (printed cost), B cast second time (+{2}), verifying independence.
metadata.generation_notes: Marked draft: the replay harness 'cast_spell' action calls find_in_hand which looks only in ZoneId::Hand; it cannot find cards in ZoneId::Command. The harness needs a 'cast_from_command_zone' action type to support this script. When added, this script should be upgraded to approved. The behavior is unit-tested in commander.rs::test_partner_commanders_separate_tax_tracking and test_cast_commander_from_command_zone_second_time / test_cast_commander_from_command_zone_third_time.

script.step_note: INFORMATIONAL: p1 casts both partner commanders multiple times to verify independent tax tracking

actions.description: Initial: both partner commanders in command zone, p1 at 40 life
actions.note: CR 702.124d: partner commanders tracked independently for tax. Both commanders start in command zone.
CR 903.8: First cast of Commander A (Llanowar Elves, {G}) — no tax. Printed cost {G} only. Tax counter for A increments to 1.
Commander A resolves and enters battlefield.
Commander A on battlefield. Tax for A is now 1 (next cast +{2}). Tax for B remains 0.

actions.description: INFORMATIONAL: Commander A dies and returns to command zone. Then p1 re-casts A with +{2} tax.
actions.note: SBA returns Commander A to command zone. Tax counter for A is 1; cost is {G}+{2}={2}{G}.
CR 903.8: Second cast of Commander A — pays +{2} tax. Total: {G}+{2}={2}{G}. Tax for B still 0.
Commander A resolves again. Tax for A is now 2 (next cast +{4}).
CR 903.8: First cast of Commander B (Darksteel Colossus, {11}) — no tax, despite A having been cast twice. Tax for B is independent. Printed cost {11} only.
Commander B resolves. Tax for A = 2 (next +{4}), Tax for B = 1 (next +{2}). Independence verified.
No SBAs. CR 702.124d: partner commander tax is per-commander. A's casts don't affect B's tax and vice versa.
